templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Addendum covering the use of AI and machine learning services, including data handling, model usage restrictions, and AI-specific obligations.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between a covered entity and a business associate under HIPAA.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for the provision of cloud-hosted software services, covering access rights, acceptable use, support, and service availability.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for early-stage design partnerships where a customer provides product feedback in exchange for early access or discounted pricing.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Agreement establishing the terms under which a processor handles personal data on behalf of a controller, in compliance with GDPR and similar regulations.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Bilateral confidentiality agreement protecting sensitive information exchanged between two parties exploring a potential business relationship.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Agreement outlining the terms of a commercial partnership, including cooperation obligations, responsibilities, and revenue or referral arrangements.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Short-term agreement granting a prospective customer limited access to a product or service for evaluation purposes prior to a full commercial commitment.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Agreement governing the delivery of professional or consulting services, including scope of work, deliverables, payment terms, and IP ownership.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Agreement defining uptime commitments, incident response times, and remedies such as service credits for failures to meet availability targets.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Agreement granting rights to use software, including license scope, restrictions, support terms, and intellectual property ownership.
